headline: Google open-sources Stitch design format for AI documentation
body: Google Labs released DESIGN.md as an open-source format for documenting AI system design decisions and trade-offs. This standardization tool directly addresses healthcare AI's documentation gaps, where clinical validation, regulatory compliance, and EHR integration require transparent design rationale. Healthcare organizations and vendors can now adopt a consistent framework to document AI model behavior, enabling better cross-institutional collaboration and faster FDA submissions. For healthcare AI consultants, this reduces friction in model governance conversations and strengthens the audit trail requirements that payers increasingly demand for value-based AI implementations.
